heading.title: My Recent
heading.subtitle: Here are some projects I've worked on.

fmdEr.title: FMD-ER
fmdEr.description1: Application developed for the COVID-19 emergency at the university, divided into two phases:
fmdEr.description2: Analysis of the face of any individual to verify the presence or absence of a surgical mask.
fmdEr.description3: Recognition of an individual's emotion, regardless of the presence of a mask.

thesis.title: BACHELOR'S THESIS IN COMPUTER NETWORKS
thesis.description: Thesis to evaluate whether the dual propagation approach using rules is able to extract the direction of anger in programmers' comments.

bandb.title: BED AND BREAKFAST WEBSITE
bandb.description: Website for B&B Il Belvedere, a charming bed and breakfast nestled in the picturesque town of Gravina in Puglia, Italy. The website is meticulously crafted with modern web technologies, including React.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code, ensuring an elegant and user-friendly experience for visitors.

housePricePred.title: HOUSE PRICE PREDICTION AND CLASSIFICATION
housePricePred.description: The project analyzed a dataset of housing information from Daegu, South Korea. Operations included data preprocessing, feature extraction, algorithm implementation for classification and regression, testing, evaluation metrics, hyperparameter optimization, and further testing of classifiers and regressors.

about.title: Hi Everyone, I'm
about.description1: With four years of experience in the Automotive sector. Main stack: Flutter, React and Java SpringBoot. Assertive communication allows me to tackle problems collaboratively, creating a positive and proactive work environment. Goal: to grow steadily, taking on progressive responsibilities and contributing to the company's long-term development.
about.description2: Apart from coding, some activities I love:
about.hobby2: 3D Modelling and Printing (digital sculpting in Blender and floor plan design)
about.phrase: Strive to build things that make a difference!

entries.content2: Full Stack Developer for mobile applications connected to Bluetooth devices and integrated with Fleet Management platforms, contributing to architecture design and cross-platform feature development. Stack: Flutter, Java Spring Boot.
entries.content1: Development and maintenance of the GTFleet 365 web platform in the IoT, Automotive and Fleet Management sector, working on both Frontend and Backend in an AGILE team. Stack: React, Node.js, Java Spring Boot, SQL, MongoDB, Cassandra.
entries.content3: Software repair and hardware component replacement on mobile phones and computers.
